Stub implementations for GPath functions used in testing.

# Purpose
This C header file provides function declarations for operations on graphical paths, which are part of a graphics library. It includes functions to initialize a path with [`gpath_init`](<#gpath_init>), move a path to a new location with [`gpath_move_to`](<#gpath_move_to>), and draw the path either as a stroke or filled using [`gpath_draw_stroke`](<#gpath_draw_stroke>) and [`gpath_draw_filled`](<#gpath_draw_filled>), respectively. Additionally, it contains internal functions for precise filling and outlining of paths, [`gpath_fill_precise_internal`](<#gpath_fill_precise_internal>) and [`gpath_draw_outline_precise_internal`](<#gpath_draw_outline_precise_internal>). The function [`gpath_outer_rect`](<#gpath_outer_rect>) returns the outer rectangle that bounds a given path. The file includes the necessary header `gpath.h` from the `applib/graphics` directory, indicating its dependency on other components of the graphics library.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/graphics/gpath.h`

[View Source →](<../../../../tests/stubs/stubs_gpath.h#L25>)
